Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Hipolito Espinozo, dba Alpha Construction Co.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Michael P. Rooney, Esq. appeared with plaintiff James Dillard, who was placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Dillard appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Hipolito Espinozo, dba Alpha Construction Co.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Intentional Misrepresentation and Fraud was filed on April 9, 2019 and personally served on defendant State National Insurance Company, Inc. on April 16, 2019.
Plaintiff's Summons & Complaint was personally served on defendant Hipolita Espinosa, dba Alpha Construction Co., on September 10, 2019.
Default as to defendant State National Insurance Company, Inc. was entered on October 2, 2019.
Default as to defendant Hipolito Espinozo, dba Alpha Construction Co., was entered on October 17, 2019.
State of Damages served via U.S. Mail on defendant Hipolito Espinozo, dba Alpha Construction Co., on January 27, 2020.
Dismissal with prejudice as to defendant State National Insurance Company, Inc. was filed with the Clerk's Office on February 7, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff James Dillard, and against the defaulted defendant Hipolito Espinoza, dba Alpha Construction Co., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,500.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $487.56.
Punitive Damages - $7,500.00.

Total - $10,487.56.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
